subject: english
text:
Fill in the Blanks with the correct homophones: 
A. The wind will ________ the leaves away. (blow / blue)
B. She wore a beautiful ________ dress. (blue / blew)
C. I can’t ________ what you are saying. (hear / here)
D. Please come and sit over ________ (hear / here)
E. He ate the whole ________ of bread. (piece / peace)
F. The world needs more ________ (peace / piece)
G. The knight rode his horse at ________ (night / knight)
H. We saw a full moon last ________ (knight / night)

subject: english
text:
State whether the sentence is true or false. 
A. The narrator saw two girls playing on the sidewalk.
B. The black boy was giving commands to the white boy.
C. The narrator felt proud when he saw the boys playing.
D. The next day, the roles of the boys were reversed.
E. The narrator spoke to the boys’ father in the end

subject: english
text:
Fill in the blanks with the correct past perfect form of the verbs in brackets:

A. She ________ (finish) her homework before dinner.
B. They ________ (leave) the house when the rain started.
C. I ________ (never/see) such a beautiful place before.
D. He ________ (eat) all the cake before we arrived.
E. We ________ (learn) the poem before the test.
